title: tragacantha preussii
intro: Tragacantha preussii, also known as the "Kallaree" or "Kallar", is a plant species belonging to the family Fabaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Tragacantha preussii include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an antidote for snake and scorpion bites. Herbal preparations of Tragacantha preussii include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
